title: Verify existing implementation of HTTP method decorator middleware
description: The method-guard.ts middleware and its test file already exist in src/middleware/. Implementation accepts a list of allowed HTTP methods, checks request.method, returns 405 Method Not Allowed for disallowed methods, and includes comprehensive edge case coverage (24 tests). All tests pass.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - Next.js middleware pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse
